children.text: causes serious bodily injury to members of that group;
causes the permanent impairment of the mental faculties of members of the group through drugs, torture, or similar techniques;
subjects the group to conditions of life that are intended to cause the physical destruction of the group in whole or in part;
imposes measures intended to prevent births within the group; or
transfers by force children of the group to another group;
in the case of an offense under subsection (a)(1), where death results, by death or imprisonment for life and a fine of not more than $1,000,000, or both; and
a fine of not more than $1,000,000 or imprisonment for not more than twenty years, or both, in any other case.

children.heading: .—Incitement Offense
children.label: c .—Incitement Offense
children.text: Whoever directly and publicly incites another to violate subsection (a) shall be fined not more than $500,000 or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.

children.heading: .—Attempt and Conspiracy
children.label: d .—Attempt and Conspiracy
children.text: Any person who attempts or conspires to commit an offense under this section shall be punished in the same manner as a person who completes the offense.
the offense is committed in whole or in part within the United States; or

children.label: A
children.text: a national of the United States (as that term is defined in section 101 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ());8 U.S.C. 1101

children.label: B
children.text: an alien lawfully admitted for permanent residence in the United States (as that term is defined in section 101 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ());8 U.S.C. 1101

children.label: C
children.text: a stateless person whose habitual residence is in the United States; or

children.heading: .—Nonapplicability of Certain Limitations
children.label: f .—Nonapplicability of Certain Limitations
children.text: Notwithstanding section 3282, in the case of an offense under this section, an indictment may be found, or information instituted, at any time without limitation.
